listening.title: Listening: Booking an appointment
listening.transcript: The appointment is on the fifth of March. Can you come at ten o'clock? It is the second appointment this month.

questions.question: The appointment is on the fifth of ___.
questions.explanation: "The appointment is on the fifth of March."

listening.title: Listening: Review — A busy schedule
listening.transcript: Can you help me? First, fill in this form, then sign at the bottom. The meeting is on the second of May. This pen is small, but it works well.

questions.question: What should you do after filling in the form?
questions.explanation: "fill in this form, then sign at the bottom."

questions.question: The meeting is on the second of ___.
questions.explanation: "The meeting is on the second of May."
